title: Assistant Store Manager - Starbucks India International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Starbucks India International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Starbucks India International Enterprises in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!
